over.title: About
over.description:
As a software developer, I am always looking for new challenges and ways to improve myself. I like learning by doing and enjoy discovering and trying out new technologies and programming languages. I work in a structured way and pick things up quickly, which helps me turn ideas into something that actually works.

I work well in a team and enjoy collaborating on projects, but I am also comfortable working independently. I am direct and practical, and I like to build, test and iterate.

items.description: In school, we also receive practical assignments, where we learn to work well together in a period of time, and get to know the business world.

During my internship at Company 100, I was a full stack developer and worked with the CodeIgniter framework and their own CMS system to develop various web applications. I improved my styling skills using SCSS.

During my internship at Bounsel in Valencia, I worked as a full stack developer on Timbuzz, a desktop application built with Tauri and Nuxt. The app tracks work activities throughout the day and summarizes them, making it easier to create quotes and support them with a clear overview of completed work.

items.school: Avans University of Applied Sciences Breda
items.degree: Bachelor's in Computer Science - propaedeutic certificate obtained
items.description: I am currently studying Computer Science at Avans University of Applied Sciences in Breda. In 2025, I obtained my first-year HBO propaedeutic certificate, successfully completing the first year of the program.
Completed the Software Developer vocational education program.

hobby.title: Hobbies
hobby.description: In my free time, I spend a lot of time exercising and regularly go to the gym. I also enjoy gaming and spend a lot of time with music. I like discovering new things and challenging myself, both creatively and technically. I also regularly experiment with programming and new technologies, so I can keep developing myself and learning new skills.
